case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. GABILY GONZALEZ CASTELLON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTELLON, GABILY GONZALEZ $1,833.89 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,948.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
